title: StackPicks · Google Ads MCP — Google ads via Claude

rows.title: Read campaigns, keywords, ad groups
rows.desc: Pull live performance into Claude. Ask 'why is CPC up 40% this week' and get an answer.

rows.title: Auth via OAuth refresh token
rows.desc: One-time setup. Token stored locally. Claude never sees your Google password.

rows.title: Bulk reporting in plain English
rows.desc: 'Top 10 worst-performing keywords by ROAS'. One prompt. Skip the GAds UI marathon.

install.body: Clone the repo. Add your Google Ads OAuth credentials to .env. Add the MCP entry to claude_desktop_config.json. Restart Claude.

rows.title: Meta wins for
rows.desc: Setup. Sign-in with Meta = zero config. Google needs OAuth refresh token wrangling.

rows.title: Google wins for
rows.desc: Maturity. Google Ads API is older + more stable. Better for serious account management.

rows.title: Run both side-by-side
rows.desc: Cross-platform reports in one prompt. 'Show me ROAS by channel last 30 days.'

take.use_if: You run Google Ads + want to query / bulk-edit in plain English. Saves 30-60 min/day on reporting tasks for any serious advertiser.
take.skip_if: You only spend ₹5k/mo on ads. The Google Ads UI is fine at that scale. MCPs shine when you have 10+ campaigns.

more.body: Meta Ads MCP · TikTok Ads MCP · LinkedIn Ads. Curated takes.
more.sub: 8 picks · official + community · updated this week

caption_line: Google Ads from Claude — open-source MCP server. OAuth setup once, query live campaigns forever. Comment GOOGLEADS for the install link ↓
